title: Mafia
description: A simple mod that recreates the social game of mafia in Minecraft
body:
My Mafia mod aimed to recreate the social game - _mafia_ which is played sitting in a circle
(this mod uses veil! yippie)

I made a video about how I made it and played it with my friends here:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/IvGY_QV_xEw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Instructions for play:
1. Setup voicechat and the mafia mod onto a server (multiplayer mods like essential or lan worlds should work)
2. Either load the world file into singleplayer with lan or setup a server with it. You can get the world file here: [mafia world file](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1uvESZVO6aTk0fNP3lKipQ5Z0h_zWNVkG/view?usp=sharing)
3. To start a game, run 
```/startgame (mafias)```
 replacing _(mafias)_ with the number of mafias you want in the game. There will always be 1 sheriff
4. This game is best played with brightness on minimum and chat hidden

Enjoy mafia with your friends!
(btw the mod might be buggy and i'm not fixing bugs since i'm starting on new projects but shouldn't be anything game breaking)
